data.title: Encryption Key Management
data.description: Handles encryption key management, crucial to preventing unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Key management is decentralized and secured at both ends of communication.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.technical_spec: Users can set up an additional PIN to access their account.

data.title: Fraud Detection
data.description: Monitors and detects fraudulent activities within the application.
data.technical_spec: AI-powered algorithms are used to track unusual patterns and behavior.

data.title: Bug Bounty Program
data.description: Engages ethical hackers to find and report vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Includes a comprehensive program that rewards successful submissions.

data.title: Network Security Protocols
data.description: Implements advanced network security protocols to protect data during transmission.
data.technical_spec: SSH, Secure Sockets Layer (SSL), and Transport Layer Security (TLS) are employed.
